$comment: Velarro Estate — design tokens from Figma. STATUS: BLOCKED. No variable/style data was retrieved before the rate limit on 2026-07-01. The continuation run fills this from get_variable_defs on the Approved Wireframes section and from styles observed in get_design_context. Tokens map to Tailwind CSS v4 @theme variables in app/globals.css during implementation.

_tokenSchema.figmaName: string — exact variable/style name, e.g. color/brand/primary
_tokenSchema.type: color | typography | spacing | radius | shadow | breakpoint | opacity | other
_tokenSchema.value: string|object — resolved value(s); include per-mode values if the file uses modes
